behavior_in_task_description.reason: All asserted paths (summon-mcp.md, skills-mcp.md, using-extensions.md, etc.), literal strings ('## Configuration', '## Example Usage', 'extensionName="Summon"', 'summon-retro-site.png'), and frontmatter keys (title, description) are named in instruction.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what to change and required content, but doesn't provide the exact markdown body or prescribe specific sentences/lines.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for substring presence (e.g., 'summon-mcp', 'Summon', section headers) rather than exact wording, allowing multiple valid implementations.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Beyond text checks, tests run npm ci, npm test, npm run build, and verify-build.sh which execute the actual docs build pipeline.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require file creation with non-trivial content (>500 bytes, PNG >1000 bytes, specific section headers), which a stub cannot satisfy.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Each of the 7 tasks in instruction.md maps to corresponding test functions checking the required changes.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with comment headers for fail-to-pass, pass-to-pass CI, and pass-to-pass static regression sections.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task produces markdown docs and an image, not structured data.

no_typos.reason: Filenames and paths in instruction.md match those asserted in tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the files to edit, which is the scope of the task (doc rename), not hidden bug localization.
